title: Add /position CoAP resource using SenML CBOR (Content-Format 112)
description: Implement GET /position returning current node location as SenML per spec 12-apps.md and coap_location.c pattern. Support OSCORE if privacy mode requires. Update handlers struct, coap_server.c, register in puck app. Add test vectors.
